NameGen.Description: Dwarven names, based mainly on Old Norse, Anglo-Saxon, and Germanic names, with a few from other sources.

Join.Markov:
AEIOUYaeiouy JWjw HLRhlr FMNSVZfmnsvzÐÞðþ BCDGKPQTXbcdgkpqtx
Agmundr Agnar Agnarr Agnur Agronn Aleifr Alfarr Alfrikr Alfvin Algautr Andor Anundr Anðor Arnfinnr Arnorr Arnsteinn Arnviðr Arnþorr Asbjarn Asbjorn Asbrond Asgeirr Asgorn Asgrond Asketill Asmundor Asmundr Asvaldr Authun Auðr Auðun Aðalsteinn Bada Baggi Barðr Beogrim Beorhtric Beorhtsige Beornræd Beowulf Birgir Bjarn Bjarni Bjartr Bjorn Botwulf Brand Brandr Brock Brond Bronn Broðir Brynjarr Burgheard Dag Dagfinn Dagfinnr Dagn Dagr Danr Dudda Dunstan Eadwulf Ealdhelm Ealdræd Ealhstan Eardwulf Egill Eidriþ Eileifr Einarr Eindriði Eirick Eirikr Erlend Erlendr Erlingr Eysteinn Eyvindr Fastulf Fastulfr Felagi Finnr Flaeming Flæmingr Folki Friðþjofr Froði Froþi Gauti Gautstafr Geir Geirmundr Geirr Gisli Gjord Gjurd Godric Gulbrandr Gunni Gunnvaldr Guðbrandr Guðfrøðr Guðini Guðleifr Guðmundr Guðormr Guðrøðr Guðþormr Hakon Halfdan Hallbjorn Halli Hallr Hallsteinn Hallvarðr Hallþorr Hamundr Haraldr Harðaknutr Haukr Havarðr Helgi Hemingr Hereward Herleifr Hildræd Hjalmarr Holmgeirr Hoskuldr Hrafn Hreiðarr Hroaldor Hroaldr Hroar Hroarr Hrolfr Hroðgar Hroðgeirr Hroðulf Hroðulfr Hroðvaldr Hroðwulf Hroþgar Hrœrekr Hrǿrikr Hugleikr Hæth Ingi Ingimarr Ingolfr Ivarr Joarr Josteinn Kalfr Kari Ketill Knutr Kolr Kori Leifr Mundi Njall Odalric Oddbjorn Oddgeirr Oddr Oddvarr Olvir Orsic Osgar Ottarr Ragnarr Ragnvaldr Randulfr Raðulfr Runi Sigeberht Sigeweard Sigfrøðr Sigsteinn Sigurðr Snorri Solvi Somerled Stali Steinarr Steingrimr Steinn Stigandr Stigr Stiþwulf Sture Sturla Styrmir Sumarliði Sundri Suni Sveinn Sveinungr Sverrir Swiðhun Tofi Toki Tryggvi Ulfr Ulrich Uni Urist Vagn Valdimarr Valþjofr Vebjorn Vegarðr Vemundr Vetrliði Vigi Vikingr Vragi Widogast Wighard Woden Wulfgang Wulfgeirr Wulfgrim Wulfhard Wulfhram Yngvarr Yrian Ælfgar Ælfræd Æsc Æthelberht Æðelbeald Æðelfrið Æðelmær Æðelric Æðelræd Æðelstan Æðelwine Æðelwulf Æþelbald Æþelbeorht Æþelnoð Æþelræd Æþelweald Æþelweard Æþelwulf Þorarinn Þorbjorn Þorfastr Þorfinnr Þorfreðr Þorgeirr Þorgisl Þorgnyr Þorgrimr Þorir Þorketill Þorleifr Þorleikr Þormoðr Þorsteinn Þorvaldr Þorðr Þrondr Þunor

Alfhildr Alof Angrboða Arnbjorg Asa Asgerðr Ashildr Aslaug Asny Asta Astriðr Auðrhildr Bealdhild Bergljot Birna Bjorg Borghild Borghildr Borgny Bothildr Brynhild Brynhildr Cyneburga Cyneswiþ Cyneðryð Dagmær Dagny Dagrun Eadburga Eadgyð Ealdgyð Ealhswiþ Eir Elli Embla Eoforhild Eoforhildr Eormenhild Erna Eydis Eyvor Frea Freya Freyja Frig Frigg Friða Friðuswiþ Gefion Gefjon Gerd Gerðr Godgifu Godgyð Grid Grimhild Grimhildr Griðr Groa Gudrun Gulla Gunnbjorg Gunnhildr Gunnr Gunnvor Guðbjorg Guðlaug Guðleif Guðny Guðriðr Guðrun Gyða Hallbjorg Hallþora Heidrun Heiðrun Hel Hilda Hildigunnr Hildr Hjordis Hlif Holmfriðr Hrafnhildr Hreiðunn Hrǫnn Huld Hulda Idun Idunn Ingibjorg Ingigerðr Ingriðr Ingvildr Iðunn Jorunnr Kara Ketillaug Ketilriðr Kolbrun Laufey Leofdæg Leofflæd Leofgyð Magnhildr Malmfriðr Milburga Mildþryð Myrgjol Nal Nanna Oddbjorg Oddny Oddrun Olaug Ragnbjorg Ragnfriðr Ragnheiðr Ragnhildr Ran Runa Saga Salbjorg Saldis Sif Signy Sigriðr Sigrun Sigyn Siv Skadi Skaði Skuld Sol Solveig Sunngifu Sunnifa Sunniva Svanhild Svanhildr Thrud Tofa Unnr Urd Urðr Valdis Vanadis Verdandi Verðandi Vigdis Wihtburg Wilburg Wulfflæd Wulfgifu Wulfrun Wulfwynn Wulfþryð Wynnflæd Yngvildr Yrsa Æbbe Ælfthryth Ælfþryð Æðelflæd Æðelþryð Þone Þora Þorbjorg Þordis Þorfriðr Þorgunnr Þorhildr Þorny Þorunn Þorveig Þorvi Þruðr Þyri

Join.Words: Ale Aluminium Amber Anvil Ashen Battle Bear Beer Black Blue Bold Brass Brave Brick Bronze Brown Cave Cavern Chisel Coal Copper Crimson Dark Deep Diamond Dig Dirt Doom Dragon Drunken Earth Ember Emerald Epic Flint Gem Giant Glory Gold Golden Gravel Graven Great Green Grendel Grey Grit Grumble Hammer Hard Heavy Honour Iron Lead Legend Metal Mountain Noble Oaken Old Pale Pebble Proud Quartz Red Rock Rough Ruby Rust Silver Steel Stone Stout Strong Stronginthe Thunder Tin Troll Tungsten Under War White Wild Yellow

arm armour axe bastard beard bellow belly belt blade bold boot born boulder buckle chest chin chisel crafter deep delver depth digger diggy doom drinker face fall fast feast fighter fire fist flame flint forge forged fort gate glory gold grim grip ground grumble guard guts hall hammer heart hearth helm hide honour hound humble jewel keg kin labour legend master mighty miner mood mountain pebble pick quake quarry quartz rock rocky ruby rust rusty saga shield slayer slumber smasher smiter smith snow song soul spell spirit stone stoney strength strike striker strong sword timber tough true winter wise wolf worker wrath wrought
